Get started

Marcus Liu

Backend Engineer

Marcus Liu is a highly skilled Backend Engineer with a strong focus on building reliable, scalable, and high-performance systems that power modern digital products. His work centers on designing robust server-side architectures that ensure security, efficiency, and seamless integration across platforms. With a deep understanding of backend technologies and system design.

  • Position – Backend Engineer

  • Experience – 9+ Years

  • Location – 88 Silverline Towers, Tech Corridor Area, Singapore City, Singapore

  • Email – marcus.liu@company.com

  • Phone – +65 9123 4567

Biography

Marcus Liu has built a strong professional foundation in backend engineering by working on complex, data-driven systems across a range of industries and platforms. His career reflects a consistent focus on performance optimization, system reliability, and secure architecture design, enabling products to operate smoothly under demanding conditions. Throughout his professional journey, Marcus has collaborated closely with frontend engineers, product designers, and infrastructure teams to design backend solutions that align with functional requirements and long-term business goals. He has contributed to initiatives involving API development, database architecture, authentication systems, and cloud-based services, ensuring seamless communication between systems and users.

Marcus is particularly experienced in building scalable infrastructures that support growth and evolving product needs. By applying best practices in system design, monitoring, and optimization, he helps ensure that platforms remain stable, maintainable, and resilient as usage scales over time.

Beyond technical execution, Marcus actively participates in code reviews, architectural discussions, and continuous improvement initiatives. He values clean code, documentation, and collaborative problem-solving, allowing teams to move faster while maintaining high standards of quality and security.

Our Skills

Marcus Liu brings a specialized backend engineering skill set that supports system scalability, performance, and security. His expertise enables teams to build dependable infrastructures that serve as the foundation for high-quality digital products and services. He applies his skills across backend development, database management.

Backend Development

92%

System Architecture

86%

Database Management

82%

Marcus believes that strong backend systems are built on thoughtful design, rigorous testing, and continuous optimization. He focuses on creating architectures that are flexible, secure, and capable of supporting long-term product evolution.

By combining technical depth with a structured and collaborative approach, Marcus helps teams deliver reliable digital solutions that perform consistently and scale confidently with business growth.
